creator: jonny@mailhost.coppe.ufrj.br
text:
I've made a new port, xtoolwait-1.1.

	The port structure is available at
	ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/xtoolwait-1.1-port.tgz

	Very simple to port, and a very useful utility for those with
	lots of tools to startup with X11.  Similar to OpenWindows'
	toolwait utility.
